'''Red 9''' was a [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]] in service to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Flown by [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Nozzo Naytaan/Legends|Nozzo Naytaan]], the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] was outfitted with extra cargo room and led the [[Relief of Clak'dor VII|relief]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] to [[Clak'dor VII/Legends|Clak'dor VII]].<ref name="CCG-Red9" />

Reassigned to the [[Great Temple/Legends|Great Temple]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]],<ref name="ANH" /> Red 9 was assigned to [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]]<ref name="CCG-Red9" /> and participated in the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="CCG-Naytaan" />
